title: UFO Sighting By Minnesota Police Department Employees Led To Federal Investigation: ‘Did Not Appear To Be Conventional Aircraft’
description: A UFO sighting in Anoka, Minnesota, by at least three police department employees, including one police officer, led to an investigation by the FBI. title: FL Entrepreneur’s UFO Sightings Lead To His Opening A Beachside Alien Artifacts Museum
description: An entrepreneur began seeing strange lights off the deck of his St. Pete Beach home three years ago. Now, he owns the Museum of the Unknown.
